questions.context_sentence: What's the weather like?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：we(我们)+ath(啊，太)+er(人) -> 我们人类啊，特别在乎每天的天气(weather)。
questions.prompt: What's the ______ like? (提示: 天气)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's sunny, sunny, sunny.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：sun(太阳)+ny -> 太阳出来了，今天是个阳光充足的(sunny)日子。
questions.prompt: It's ______, sunny, sunny. (提示: 阳光充足的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cl(窗帘)+oud(偶的) -> 窗帘拉开，看到了天空中偶的云(cloud)朵。
questions.prompt: The ______ go by, by, by. (提示: 云)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.meaning: prep. 经过; 靠近; 乘(车/船等)
questions.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：by(表示在……旁) -> 经过(by)你身旁。
questions.prompt: The clouds go ______, by, by. (提示: 经过)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's cloudy, cloudy, cloudy.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：cloud(云)+y(形容词后缀) -> 云很多，就是多云的(cloudy)。
questions.prompt: It's ______, cloudy, cloudy. (提示: 多云的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：win(赢)+d(的) -> 赢得胜利，风(wind)在呼啸庆祝。
questions.prompt: The ______ blows around, around, around. (提示: 风)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：b(不)+low(低) -> 风吹(blow)得高高的，一点都不低。
questions.prompt: The wind ______ around, around, around. (提示: 吹)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's windy, windy, windy.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：wind(风)+y(形容词后缀) -> 风很大，就是风大的(windy)。
questions.prompt: It's ______, windy, windy. (提示: 风大的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The rain comes down, down, down.
questions.cn: 雨落下来，落下来，落下来。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：r(人)+ain(看作pain痛苦) -> 人在雨(rain)中奔跑，有些痛苦。
questions.prompt: The ______ comes down, down, down. (提示: 雨)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's rainy, rainy, rainy.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：rain(雨)+y(形容词后缀) -> 下着雨，就是多雨的(rainy)。
questions.prompt: It's ______, rainy, rainy. (提示: 多雨的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The snow dances around, around, around.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：s(蛇)+now(现在) -> 蛇现在(now)看见下雪(snow)了，赶紧去冬眠。
questions.prompt: The ______ dances around, around, around. (提示: 雪)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: It's snowy, snowy, snowy.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：snow(雪)+y(形容词后缀) -> 到处是雪，就是下雪的(snowy)季节。
questions.prompt: It's ______, snowy, snowy. (提示: 下雪的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: In any weather, we have fun.
questions.cn: 无论什么天气，我们都玩得很开心。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：an(一个)+y -> 任何一个(any)苹果，我都喜欢吃。
questions.prompt: In ______ weather, we have fun. (提示: 任何一个)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：c(吃)+old(老的人) -> 老人吃冰激凌，感觉非常冷(cold)。
questions.prompt: Hot, ______, cool or warm. (提示: 冷的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：o(圆圈)+r(人) -> 这个人或者(or)那个圆圈，二选一。
questions.prompt: Hot, cold, cool ______ warm. (提示: 或者)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Enjoy them all!
questions.hint: 联想记忆：en(使)+joy(欢乐) -> 带来欢乐，享受(enjoy)其中。
questions.prompt: ______ them all! (提示: 享受)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：wa(哇)+rm(热水) -> 哇，这盆热水好温暖(warm)。
questions.prompt: It's sunny and ______ today. (提示: 温暖的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：coo(咕咕声)+l(冰激凌) -> 鸟儿在凉爽(cool)的树荫下咕咕叫。
questions.prompt: Oh, it's ______! Let's go home. (提示: 凉爽的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Hot, cold, cool or warm.
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ho(火)+t(桶) -> 像火桶一样热(hot)。
questions.prompt: But it's ______ in Sanya. It never snows! (提示: 热的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The sun comes up, up, up.
questions.cn: 太阳升起来，升起来，升起来。
questions.hint: comes(来)+up(向上) -> 向上来，也就是升起(comes up)。
questions.prompt: The sun ______ in the morning. (提示: 升起)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The clouds go by, by, by.
questions.hint: go(走)+by(在……旁边) -> 走过(go by)。
questions.prompt: The clouds ______ in the sky. (提示: 走过/经过)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The wind blows around, around, around.
questions.hint: blow(吹)+around(周围) -> 吹向四周(blow around)。
questions.prompt: The wind ______ the dry leaves. (提示: 到处吹)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The rain comes down, down, down.
questions.cn: 雨落下来，落下来，落下来。
questions.hint: come(来)+down(向下) -> 降落，下来(come down)。
questions.prompt: The rain ______ from the sky. (提示: 降落/下来)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The snow dances around, around, around.
questions.hint: dance(跳舞)+around(周围) -> 围绕周围起舞(dance around)。
questions.prompt: The snowflakes ______ in the cold wind. (提示: 翩翩起舞)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: In any weather, we have fun.
questions.cn: 无论什么天气，我们都玩得很开心。
questions.hint: have(有)+fun(乐趣) -> 拥有乐趣也就是玩得开心(have fun)。
questions.prompt: In any weather, we ______ outside. (提示: 玩得开心)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: We can go out to play.
questions.hint: go(走)+out(向外) -> 走出去(go out)。
questions.prompt: We can ______ to play in the yard. (提示: 出去)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: I've got a good idea.
questions.hint: good(好的)+idea(主意) -> 好主意(good idea)。
questions.prompt: I've got a ______ for the game. (提示: 好主意)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: What's the weather like in your weather diary?
questions.cn: 你的天气日记里天气怎么样？
questions.hint: 联想记忆：di(弟)+ary(名词后缀) -> 弟弟每天都在写日记(diary)。
questions.prompt: Write down the weather in your weather ______. (提示: 日记)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Liu Fei is a teacher at a children's home in Sanya.
questions.cn: 刘菲是三亚一家儿童之家的老师。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：teach(教)+er(人) -> 教书的人就是教师，老师(teacher)。
questions.prompt: Liu Fei is a ______ at a children's home in Sanya. (提示: 教师)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Does it taste like ice cream?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：t(太)+as(像)+te(特) -> 这个味道太像特别的巧克力的味道(taste)了。
questions.prompt: Does snow ______ like ice cream? (提示: 有...的味道)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Does it taste like ice cream?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：ice(冰)+cream(奶油) -> 冰冰的奶油就是冰激凌(ice cream)。
questions.prompt: Does snow taste like ______? (提示: 冰激凌)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: The children here want to see real snow.
questions.cn: 这里的孩子们想要看真正的雪。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：re(热)+al(所有) -> 热爱所有真的(real)东西。
questions.prompt: The children here want to see ______ snow. (提示: 真的)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Two days later, Liu Fei gets a big box.
questions.cn: 两天后，刘菲收到了一个大箱子。
questions.hint: 联想记忆：late(迟的)+r -> 迟一点也就是之后，以后(later)。
questions.prompt: Two days ______, Liu Fei gets a big box. (提示: 之后)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Do I need my coat or not?
questions.hint: 联想记忆：c(穿)+oat(看作boat船) -> 穿着外套(coat)去划船。
questions.prompt: Do I need my ______ or not in winter? (提示: 外套)
questions.title: Vocab Master

questions.context_sentence: Come on! Let's turn on the TV.

questions.title: Vocab Master
